events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a group lockbox being misused on a residential job, under Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) scope, at rough-complete stage. OSHA 1910.147 governs control of hazardous energy. Misuse of a group lockbox means the energy isolation procedure is defective/non-compliant, creating serious risk.
